name: Apple Pear Brown Betty
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice apples and pears into thin slices.
2. Cube the whole wheat bread slices.
3. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
4. Toss apples and pears with lemon juice in a bowl.
5. Toss bread cubes/crumbs with butter and sugar in another bowl.
6. Combine brown sugar, lemon peel, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl.
7. Spread half of the fruit in a 9-inch square baking dish.
8. Sprinkle with half the bread cubes and then half the sugar mixture.
9. Repeat layering.
10. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
11. Uncover and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
12. Serve with custard sauce.
